sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73822" key="o(mo/shmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμό-σημος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73822.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having the same meaning,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">161</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
